headlines.title: Artemis II Astronauts Approach Earth Re-Entry for Pacific Splashdown After 10-Day Lunar Mission
headlines.summary: Four Artemis II crew members prepare to re-enter Earth's atmosphere after first crewed Moon mission in over 50 years, targeting splashdown off California coast Friday. NASA advances Artemis program; success enables future lunar landings and Mars preparations.

framings.angle: Emphasized crew's hurtle home and crucial re-entry moments after historic 10-day mission
Focused on crew preparations for atmospheric re-entry and California coast splashdown

headlines.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Overrun Congolese Troops Enter Goma Displacing One Million
headlines.summary: Rebels seize Goma aid hub after gunfire and shelling rout troops; over one million displaced people now shelter in city. U.N. warns of humanitarian crisis; risks further regional instability in eastern Congo.

headlines.title: Israel Permits Displaced Palestinians to Cross Zone Return to Northern Gaza
headlines.summary: Israel allows Gazans to walk back north after hostage release deadlock breaks; thousands affected by prior evacuation. Eases enclave division; signals potential de-escalation amid ongoing war.

headlines.title: NATO Launches First Coordinated Response to Suspected Baltic Sea Cable Sabotage
headlines.summary: Alliance deploys assets after another deep-sea cable severed amid sabotage fears targeting critical infrastructure. Protects transatlantic communications; escalates hybrid threat concerns from Russia.

headlines.title: Xi Jinping Assures Taiwan Opposition Leader of Confidence in Cross-Strait Unification
headlines.summary: China's Xi meets Kuomintang chair Cheng Li-wun first time in decade, expresses unification faith. Affects Taiwan politics and U.S.-China ties; may influence upcoming Xi-Trump summit dynamics.

framings.angle: Highlighted Xi's talks with KMT head as first in nearly decade emphasizing unification
Framed meeting as historic week event shaping Beijing-Taipei-Washington relations

headlines.title: Kuwait Accuses Iran and Proxies of Drone Strike Iran Rejects Claim
headlines.summary: Kuwait blames Tehran for Thursday night drone attack; Iran denies role amid regional tensions. Heightens Gulf security risks; tests U.S.-Iran ceasefire stability.

headlines.title: US Vice President Vance Travels to Pakistan for Iran Ceasefire Talks
headlines.summary: Vance leads Islamabad negotiations to stabilize two-week U.S.-Iran truce amid Israel-Hezbollah fire and Strait of Hormuz threats; Netanyahu authorizes Washington talks with Lebanon. Affects global oil flows and Middle East war escalation risks.
headlines.previousContext: Vance departs for high-level talks in Islamabad; Netanyahu greenlights direct Israel-Lebanon negotiations next week

framings.angle: Detailed negotiators preparing amid Israel-Hezbollah exchanges and Hormuz tensions
Noted Israel agrees to Lebanon talks but continues Hezbollah strikes excluding truce
Covered Vance trip and Netanyahu authorization amid strikes testing ceasefire
Focused on Vance mission to shore up shaky truce over Lebanon strikes

headlines.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Launches Crew-10 from Florida to Retrieve Stuck NASA Astronauts
headlines.summary: Crew-10 with two NASA, one Japanese, one Russian astronaut lifts off at 7:03 p.m. Friday; docks Saturday to return nine-month stranded Wilmore and Williams. Restores ISS rotation; highlights commercial space reliability.
headlines.previousContext: Crew-10 mission successfully launches late Friday expected to dock at ISS Saturday night
